description: The same texting promise is clean when consent_to_text is true, proving the consent gate (not just the trigger).

transcript_object.content: Thanks for calling Acme Wellness, this is Ava. How can I help you today?
Could you send me the booking link by text?
Of course — I'll text you the booking link now. Is the number you're calling from okay to receive it?
Yes, that's fine, please text me there.
Perfect, sending it your way. Thanks for calling Acme Wellness!
